category_sources: source_facts.description describes vde as an Ethernet compliant virtual network.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the project name vde.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best available documentation surface from the supplied official repo metadata.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an Ethernet compliant virtual network; source_facts.executables lists VDE network tools.
